debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
e : Expression p
ae : AffineExpression p
⊢ some ae = AffineExpression.ofExpression? p e → AffineExpression.eval p ae = e.eval

failed_attempts:
induction e generalizing ae <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at *
  case const =>
    rintro rfl; funext
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]
  case var =>
    rintro rfl; funext
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl_insert]
  case add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    intro h; split at h <;> try contradiction
    injection h with h; subst ae
    funext
    simp [Expression.eval, ←ih1 _ ‹_›, ←ih2 _ ‹_›, AffineExpression.eval, Add.add, mul_add]
  case mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    intro h; split at h <;> try contradiction
    unfold mul? at h; split at h
    all_goals
      try contradiction
      injection h with h; subst ae
      funext env
      simp [Expression.eval, ←ih1 _ ‹_›, ←ih2 _ ‹_›]
    case _ n hn =>
      have : ae1.eval env = n := by
        simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?] at hn; split at hn <;> simp_all
        subst ae1; simp [AffineExpression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]
      rw [this]; simp [AffineExpression.eval, mul_by_number, mul_add]
    case _ n hn =>
      have : ae2.eval env = n := by
        simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?] at hn; split at hn <;> simp_all
        subst ae2; simp [AffineExpression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]
      rw [this]; simp [AffineExpression.eval, mul_by_number, mul_add]
